numbers.heading: By The Numbers
numbers.description: Indonesia is one of the world's most biodiverse and culturally rich destinations, with wonders that few places on Earth can match.

stats.label: Unique species of wildlife found nowhere else on Earth

articles.title: The walkways of Indonesia spellbind
articles.description: Discover ancient paths that wind through lush jungles and terraced rice fields, revealing the soul of the archipelago.

articles.title: Perfect beaches exude relaxation and fun
articles.description: From hidden coves to sweeping bays, Indonesia's coastlines offer endless sun-soaked escapes for every traveller.
